taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Business Intelligence, Data Analysis, SQL, Python, Power BI
skill_match_scores: Business Intelligence:0.0, Data Analysis:1.0, SQL:1.0, Python:1.0, Power BI:0.0
must_have_quals: 5+ years of experience in business intelligence, data analysis, or a similar role, Advanced SQL skills and comfort working directly with raw tables to produce clean, performant queries, Intermediate Python skills to model and analyze raw tables, Hands-on experience with one or more modern BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker), Strong data visualization and communication skills, Passionate about helping others understand and use data to drive better decisions, Experience working in cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP), Experience working in agile, cross-functional teams, Ability to multitask, prioritize, and adhere to deadlines while maintaining attention to detail and quality, Comfortable in a fast-paced, frequently changing environment
preferred_quals: Familiarity with dbt or dimensional modeling concepts is a plus, Familiarity with healthcare, telehealth, or regulatory data (e.g., HIPAA) is a plus
core_responsibilities: Partner with Product & Engineering teams to understand their goals and translate them into metrics, reports, and dashboards, Build reporting products within the application, Build, maintain, and enhance core business dashboards using Power BI, Utilize AI to maximize efficiency, Use SQL and Python to extract, analyze, and transform data to support reporting and ad hoc analysis, Own the design and documentation of key business metrics, ensuring clarity and consistency across teams, Proactively identify trends, anomalies, and opportunities in data and share insights with stakeholders, Collaborate with Data Engineering and Analytics Engineering to ensure data models meet reporting needs and support self-service analytics, Contribute to the development of team-wide best practices for visualization, dashboard UX, and storytelling with data, Create training, documentation, and data literacy resources to enable others to access and interpret data effectively
job_summary: Hone Health is an online medical clinic focused on transforming healthcare and enhancing longevity. They are seeking a Senior Business Intelligence Analyst to collaborate with business stakeholders, design dashboards, and develop analysis to drive strategic decisions.
